raw_consumer_statement:
Complaint Against : American Express I am filing a complaint because American Express has failed to properly handle a billing dispute for recurring vendor charges that I attempted to cancel. The vendor was unreachable calls were unanswered, no email was available, and I could not access my account to cancel the service. 

I notified American Express multiple times that the charges were unauthorized and asked them to stop the vendor from billing my account. I was told repeatedly that nothing could be done and that I must resolve it with the vendor. The charges continued, and my balance increased due to fees and late payments that I did not consent to. 

American Express has been investigating for months with no written updates, no case number, and no resolution. Every time I call, the agents tell me a different story and send me back to the starting point. 

This issue caused my credit score to drop significantly ( from XXXX to XXXX ) because Amex reported multiple late payments even while the account is in dispute, which violates the Fair Credit Billing Act.

I am requesting CFPB intervention to : 1. Require Amex to complete the dispute investigation 2. Remove all incorrect late payments from my credit reports 3. Remove all unauthorized charges and fees 4. Provide written communication and a case number Thank you for your assistance.
